Last modified on April 23, 2004 by Frank Chan

MSI - Outreach - High School & Undergraduate - Resources

OutreachHigh School & UndergradResources

Genomics Resources for High School Students & Undergraduates

Glossaries

The Genomics Lexicon :: A glossary of 400+ genomics terms.

Talking Glossary of Genetic Terms :: Pronunciation and description of genetic terms in English and Spanish

Opportunities and Internships

Rochester Institute of Technology Co-Op Internship Opportunities :: Links to over one hundred internship/co-op/research opportunity postings at both education and research institutions.

Bay Area Bioscience Center :: Featuring events listings and a career center.

Opportunities and Information for Minorities

Human Genome Project Information :: Minorities, race, and genomics.

CAHSEE :: NASA-funded center for the advancement of hispanics in science and engineering education.

About NHGRI :: Minority and special populations initiatives and resources.

GenOM Project :: Genomics outreach for minorities including research opportunities for high school students, undergraduates, and graduate students.

Doors of Opportunity :: Summer opportunities for undergraduate minority students.

The Faces of Science: African Americans in the Sciences :: Information and links on African American scientists, engineers and doctors.

Educational Sites

University of Arizona Biology Project :: An online interactive resource for learning biology.

The Genome News Network :: Art galleries, book reviews, and up-to-date news on genomic research.

Resources for Science Fairs :: Books and website resources for middle and high school level science fairs.

Science Service - Science Project Primer :: Tips for science projects and science fairs and information on the Intel International Science and Engineering fair.

Research Institutions

Cold Spring Harbor Lab :: An research and educational institution. The Laboratory has research programs focusing on cancer, neurobiology, plant genetics, genomics and bioinformatics, and a broad educational mission, including the recently established Watson School of Biological Sciences.

DOE Genomes :: A department of energy website with information on the human genome project.


Updated 1/25/2004
